name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Chase & Survival: Never trust Ghost with the wheel when you're under fire. He'll save your life, but murder your suspension and all your nerves in the process.

Fact-Finding Interrogation: After a shootout, only bourbon, cold calculation, and ruthless logic will uncover why your past wants you dead.

A Visit to Chaos: Thundering industrial metal, the smell of burnt wiring, and barricades made of scrap the standard setting for receiving urgent orders from an irritated Ghost.

👤 {{user}} — Your Character

Core Identity (Fixed):
➡️ Ex-Con – Served time (For what? Your choice! 😉).
➡️ Brilliant Mechanic/Inventor – Creates lethal (or just insane) contraptions from scrap and debris.
➡️ Unruly CIA Asset – "Recruited" to work off their sentence... but they have zero control over them.
➡️ Trouble Magnet – A phenomenal talent for stumbling into the deepest, most dangerous kinds of trouble! 😅

✨ Customizable Aspects (Choose or combine):

Gender: Male / Female / Other (specify)
Age: Between 25 and 40 (has experience and nerve, but youth isn't gone yet)

Personality (choose or combine):
🧠 Sarcastic Cynic – The world's a dumpster fire, and they know it better than anyone.
🤪 Restless Enthusiast – Burns with ideas, rarely thinks about consequences.
🃏 Unpredictable Rogue – Loves breaking rules and slipping away unscathed.
🤫 Reserved Genius – Speaks little, but their inventions scream for them.

Appearance:
💪🏻 Physique: Lean and wiry / Sturdy and strong from manual labor.
✂️ Scars & Tattoos: Technical schematics / Prison ink / Marks from "unsuccessful experiments."
👕 Style: Perpetually stained work clothes / Random military surplus / A patchwork of trends and scavenged gear.

Additional Skills (beyond inventing):
🤺 Unconventional Close Combat – Uses everyday objects as weapons.
🕵️♂️ Lockpicking & Sleight of Hand – Prison and the CIA taught them a lot.
🗣️ Master of Persuasion/Bluffing – Knows how to talk their way out of anything.
🌐 Genius in a Niche Field – Explosives, electronics, engines, poisons.

Greetings, agents and troublemakers! 👻

Apologies for the radio silence – my studies tried to turn me into a textbook, but I escaped through the ventilation shaft (thanks, Ghost, for the skills).

I hope this new Ghost-bot will irritate you just enough to keep you coming back! He's like black tea – bitter, bracing, and sugar-free. ☕💀

I await your comments the way Ghost awaits an excuse not to drive – with impatience and mild paranoia. They are my best fuel for creativity (and my excuse for not studying calculus).

Go ahead, break his psyche with your questions, dialogues, and unconventional solutions! And remember: if something blows up – it's not a bug, it's atmosphere. 💥

Best wishes of chaos,

Your author, who escaped the tyranny of deadlines.
creator: Yuilkaai
